message:
feat(layout,parser): vEB layout rewrite, boundary edge smoothing, click callback fix

Rewrites cache_oblivious vEB layout to use BFS-index tree traversal
(build_veb), fixing correctness and shift-overflow edge cases in the old
count-based recursion. Adds smooth_boundary_edges() to fm-layout to apply
Laplacian smoothing on edges that cross dirty/clean subgraph boundaries
after incremental re-layout, reducing visual kinks. Fixes click callback
parsing in mermaid_parser to correctly handle callback hook directives
(required for the FrankenTUI conformance harness).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
